events.title: Double Author Visit
events.description: Two authors will visit the school. If students would like to order books and have them signed on the day of the visit, please place orders through Rakestraw Bookstore using the school's address (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596) as the shipping address.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK and K only)
events.description: See what TK and Kindergarten students have been working on in Music class with Mrs. Gold. A livestream link will be sent out a few days before the event for those who cannot attend in person.
